title: A Risk Without an Owner Is a Governance Gap
prompt: Ask who owns each risk, what controls exist, what signals trigger escalation, and who can stop the system.

title: Governance Must Change Decisions
prompt: Test whether impact assessment, monitoring, audits, and incidents can modify, pause, or retire a system.

title: Risk Is Sociotechnical
prompt: Review data, model, interface, workflow, incentives, affected people, vendors, and institutional context together.
